featured.title: Top employers in Alwar
featured.subtitle: Major companies actively hiring across Alwar — from plant-floor workers to fresh graduates.

companies.havells: Mass hiring for electrical-appliance assembly lines; graduates for inventory, billing and supervisor roles.
companies.hero: Automotive assembly, loading and parts sorting; graduates for sales, service and parts coordination.
companies.rspl: Machine operators, packaging and dispatch; graduates for supply chain and accounts.
companies.vijaysolvex: Seed-crushing, oil bottling and packaging; graduates for plant operations, quality testing and invoicing.
companies.qoot: Food packaging, sorting and bakery assistance; graduates for office administration and sales coordination.
companies.aubank: Bank officer, customer service and CASA sales roles for graduates.
companies.hdfc: Branch banking, relationship management and loan verification for graduates.
companies.icici: Branch banking and relationship roles for fresh graduates.
companies.tatacapital: Field sales and loan officer roles for graduates.
companies.bajaj: Sales and finance executive roles for graduates.
